overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The scene begins at a police crime scene under an overpass, crosses a rainy intersection with palm trees, and continues along a covered commercial street lined with holographic billboards and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: police crime scene under urban overpass

events.description: moving from covered crime scene area toward open intersection
beginning to cross the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past yellow police tape and officers, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: police officer standing guard near evidence markers on the ground
futuristic police car with glowing blue lights parked at the scene

entered.detail: bright yellow caution tape cordoning off the crime scene area
futuristic black and white police vehicle with illuminated accents
massive structural column supporting the overhead highway
multi-level highway structure with vehicles visible overhead
tall metal pole with multiple traffic signal lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a police crime scene under a massive concrete overpass. Yellow police tape cordons off an area where officers stand near evidence markers. The camera moves forward past a futuristic police car, emerging from under the overpass toward a wide urban intersection with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

events.description: futuristic vehicles passing through the intersection as ego crosses
turning right onto the covered sidewalk leaving the open intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, turning right to enter the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and hat waiting at the crosswalk corner
black futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the median of the intersection
massive orange support beam for the overhead highway structure
tall skyscrapers with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide open intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the overcast sky. Palm trees line the median while futuristic vehicles pass by. A pedestrian in a red jacket waits at the corner as the camera turns right, leaving the open intersection to enter a covered sidewalk area with a massive orange structural beam visible.

events.description: passing large holographic billboard displaying advertisements
pedestrian walking past temporarily blocks the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking toward the camera
person with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building with teal metal facade and closed roll-up security door
massive digital display showing a woman's face in advertisement
concrete wall with integrated planters containing greenery
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk sheltered from the weather, the camera passes a distinctive teal industrial building and encounters pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Large holographic billboards illuminate the right side of the street, including a prominent advertisement featuring a woman's face. The area feels like a commercial district with storefronts and overhead pedestrian walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep commercial street with dense overhead advertising

events.description: entering deeper section with stacked overhead billboards creating urban canyon effect

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered street deeper into the commercial district with dense advertising overhead

notable_agents.action: white utility van driving along the adjacent street

entered.detail: multiple layers of digital advertising screens suspended overhead
wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art
various shops with illuminated signs and metal security grates

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues deeper into the covered urban canyon where the sky is completely obscured by overhead structures and suspended digital billboards. The environment feels more enclosed with graffiti-covered walls on the left and commercial storefronts lining the street. Multiple layers of advertising displays hang overhead, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere typical of Night City's commercial districts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile police crime scene under a concrete overpass into the dense, neon-lit heart of a commercial district. It begins by moving past yellow police tape and futuristic patrol cars, emerging from the shadow of the overpass toward a wide urban intersection. As the camera crosses the wet asphalt reflecting an overcast sky, it passes palm trees and waiting pedestrians before turning right to enter a sheltered sidewalk area marked by a massive orange structural beam. The scene then shifts into a bustling commercial corridor, passing a teal industrial building and glowing holographic billboards that illuminate the path. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera moves deeper into an urban canyon where the sky is completely obscured by suspended digital displays and graffiti-covered walls.
